notes: Catalog for reusable vanilla ES6 mini-app Lego blocks. AIWizard should compose from these modules before generating custom logic. Prefer local bundling into published mini-app ZIPs; CDN loading is only a development option. Schema 1.2.0 adds composition addon recipes (isAddon: true) that layer on top of a base recipe - see recipe.with-leaderboard. Marker shape extended with optional addons: [recipeID, ...]; the gate enforces requiredComponents subset for each addon.

categories.description: Loop, timing, state, motion, and collision primitives shared by many mini-app genres.
Composable gameplay actors such as ships, paddles, cards, boards, tile grids, and player avatars.
Reusable overlays, HUD widgets, and control surfaces that can be re-skinned per swatch.
Swatches, audio, textures, and other shared presentation assets.

components.name: SwipeTileGrid

NxN numeric tile grid with classic 2048 swipe-merge mechanics: each tile merges at most once per swipe, two-of-a-kind become their sum. components.name: MemoryMatchBoard
components.summary: Memory match (concentration) board. NxM grid (must have even cell count) with face-down/face-up/matched card states. flipCard(r,c) returns {state: 'first'|'match'|'mismatch'|'ignored', card, matchedPair?, mismatchPair?}. Caller delays ~800-1200ms after a mismatch then invokes resolveMismatch() to flip both cards back. Includes static buildShuffledDeck(symbols, totalCells) + Fisher-Yates shuffle helpers. MEMORY_DEFAULT_SYMBOLS exports 36 emoji for default decks. IMPORTANT: This is a PLAIN JAVASCRIPT CLASS, NOT a Custom Element. Do NOT call customElements.define() on it. Do NOT use <memory-match-board> tags in HTML. Instantiate with `new` and call methods directly; YOU draw the UI from the instance state. (See wisdom rule fs-015.)

components.name: SudokuBoard
components.summary: Sudoku 9x9 board with row/column/3x3-subgrid validation. Cells carry {value, locked, notes}. setCell ignores locked clues. validateCell returns conflict-set; isComplete = filled+no-conflicts. Includes static SudokuBoard.generatePuzzle(difficulty) that builds a fresh randomized puzzle (easy=40 clues / medium=32 / hard=26 / expert=22). solve() does backtracking. Pencil-mark notes (Set<1-9>) per cell for the candidate-display UI feature. IMPORTANT: This is a PLAIN JAVASCRIPT CLASS, NOT a Custom Element. Do NOT call customElements.define() on it. Do NOT use <sudoku-board> tags in HTML. Instantiate with `new` and call methods directly; YOU draw the UI from the instance state. (See wisdom rule fs-015.)

components.name: HangmanGame

Tracks guessed letters, wrong count, and win/loss state. guessLetter(L) returns {kind:'correct'|'incorrect'|'repeat'|'ignored', positions?, wrongCount, state, masked}. maskedWord() reveals guessed letters as letters and unguessed as '_'. remainingLetters() returns A-Z minus tried letters for keyboard enable/disable. HANGMAN_DEFAULT_WORDS exports 100 common 4-8 letter words. IMPORTANT: This is a PLAIN JAVASCRIPT CLASS, NOT a Custom Element. Do NOT call customElements.define() on it. Do NOT use <hangman-game> tags in HTML. Instantiate with `new` and call methods directly; YOU draw the UI from the instance state. (See wisdom rule fs-015.)

contracts.state: target: string; guessed: Set<letter>; wrongCount: number; state: 'idle'|'playing'|'won'|'lost'; maxWrong: number (default 6)

Optional toroidal wrap mode. Speed scales with score (startSpeedMs, minSpeedMs, speedupPerFood). Static directionFromSwipe(sx,sy,ex,ey) helper for pointer-swipe input. IMPORTANT: This is a PLAIN JAVASCRIPT CLASS, NOT a Custom Element. Do NOT call customElements.define() on it. Do NOT use <snake-game> tags in HTML. components.name: MinimaxAI
components.summary: Generic alpha-beta (negamax) search for any 2-player turn-based board game whose rules expose legalMoves + applyMove. Snapshots from-square/to-square/capture before each apply so search-and-undo doesn't clone the board. Default depth 2. IMPORTANT: This is a PLAIN JAVASCRIPT CLASS, NOT a Custom Element. Do NOT call customElements.define() on it. Do NOT use <minimax-ai> tags in HTML. Instantiate with `new` and call methods directly; YOU draw the UI from the instance state. (See wisdom rule fs-015.) Phase 2026-05-17: now sorts moves by capture/promotion before recursing for alpha-beta cutoff bait (about 3x faster on chess at depth 3).

contracts.evalFn: function(board, color) -> number; positive when `color` is winning

components.name: SimpleOpponent

components.name: ChessAI
components.summary: MinimaxAI wrapper with chess-specific evaluator: material values + piece-square tables (PST). Default depth 3 plays competently and stays under ~1s on typical hardware thanks to MinimaxAI capture-first move ordering. Pass { depth: 4 } for stronger but slower (~3s) play. Pass depth: 0 for random legal moves.

Includes stock animations: extendArm, flinchHead, whiteFlash, popText, punchCombo. Mandated by ag-016 (multi-part anatomy) + ag-017 (visible attack animations) for Boxing, Joust, fighting games, etc.

contracts.factory: new SpriteRig({ parts: [{ name, draw, anchor?, zOrder? }] })

components.name: MiniHeader
components.summary: Compact app header (title + optional subtitle) sized to ~50-60px tall. The single source of truth for mini-app titles. Replaces oversized .hero-panel patterns; never write a raw <h1> for a user-visible title - mount MiniHeader instead.

contracts.css: Self-injects #mchatai-mini-header-styles on first instance; safe to instantiate multiple times.

constraints.userVisibleStrings: Never include internal architecture jargon ('Lego', 'web-component', 'mini-app', 'assembled from blocks') in title/subtitle. Use the actual brand or game name only.

components.name: RestartOverlay
components.summary: Centered modal overlay for game-over / play-again. Mobile-first (button >= 60x200px), keyboard-bindable (Enter/Space), self-injecting CSS, mounts against any host. Mandatory for every game with a terminal phase per wisdom rule u-029. Marker check `requiresRestartButton: true` enforces presence.

components.name: Leaderboard

All methods no-op safe when window.mChatAI.leaderboard bridge is absent (offline / signed-out). Mandatory wiring for board games (bg-006) and arcade games (ag-010) with a final score.

static: Leaderboard.submitFinal(score, metadata) -> Promise<{ rank, percentile, played } | null>
Leaderboard.renderRankCard(host, result, options?) -> DOM node | null
Leaderboard.renderTopList(host, count, options?) -> Promise<DOM node | null>
submitAndShowRank(host, score, metadata?, options?) -> Promise<DOM node | null>

components.name: GameOverWithRank
components.summary: Composed game-over panel that wraps Leaderboard.submitFinal + renderRankCard + renderTopList. When the player isn't signed in (submitFinal returns null), renders a 'Sign in at mchatai.com to post your score' CTA instead of a rank card; the top-list still renders for everyone (public read). Restart button included when onRestart is provided. Pairs with ui.leaderboard via recipe.with-leaderboard addon.

static: GameOverWithRank.show({ host, score, metadata?, title?, subtitle?, topCount?, onRestart?, restartLabel?, signIn? }) -> Promise<HTMLElement | null>

components.name: HintPulse
