notes: Self-contained single-file template - no separate .css or .js files. Marker is already stamped at the bottom of body.
Use this as the canonical wiring for a grow-on-food snake: tile grid, swipe + on-screen D-pad input, wait-for-first-input start gate (lb-005), wall/self collision, score + restart.

goldenAssemblies.name: Tappy Wings Golden Assembly
goldenAssemblies.summary: Runnable tap-to-flap arcade composed inline from entities.flappy-bird + UI scoreboard. Self-contained single-file HTML; renders under file:// and http://.
notes: Self-contained single-file template - no separate .css or .js files. Marker stamped at the bottom of body.
Use this as the canonical wiring for a Flappy clone: gravity + flap-impulse physics via entities.flappy-bird, pipe spawn/scroll, tap-anywhere input, score on pipe pass, ground+ceiling collision.

goldenAssemblies.name: Sudoku 9x9 Golden Assembly
goldenAssemblies.summary: Runnable Sudoku puzzle composed inline from entities.sudoku-board + UI scoreboard. 9x9 DOM grid with 3x3 subgrid borders, 1-9 numpad, difficulty pills. Self-contained.
notes: Self-contained single-file template - no separate .css or .js files. Marker stamped.
Canonical wiring: DOM grid (162 cells = 81 game + 81 styled subgrid borders), 1-9 numpad keyboard, difficulty pills generating different clue counts.

goldenAssemblies.name: Hangman Classic Golden Assembly

notes: Self-contained single-file template - no separate .css or .js files. Marker stamped.
Canonical wiring: secret-word reveal via dashes, full A-Z DOM keyboard, hangman figure drawn step by step on misses.

goldenAssemblies.name: Block Stack Classic Golden Assembly
goldenAssemblies.summary: Runnable falling-blocks stacker composed inline from entities.tetris-board + UI scoreboard. Falling piece + ghost on canvas, side panel (Score/Lines/Level/Next), 5-button control pad. Self-contained.
notes: Self-contained single-file template - no separate .css or .js files. Marker stamped.
Canonical wiring: canvas render with ghost, gravity timer with wait-for-first-input gate, hard-drop + soft-drop + rotate, line-clear scoring, next-piece preview.

goldenAssemblies.name: Solitaire (Klondike) Golden Assembly
goldenAssemblies.summary: Runnable Klondike Solitaire composed inline from entities.solitaire-klondike + UI scoreboard. Felt-green table, 7-column stair-step deal, stock/waste, foundation suit watermarks. Self-contained.
notes: Self-contained single-file template - no separate .css or .js files. Marker stamped.
Canonical wiring: 7-column tableau with 1..7 face-down + 1 face-up dealt, stock recycle on exhaustion, foundation A-K by suit, tableau K-A alternating colors.

goldenAssemblies.name: Memory Match (Pairs) Golden Assembly
goldenAssemblies.summary: Runnable memory-match composed inline from entities.memory-match-board + UI scoreboard. 4x4 face-down cards with purple-pink gradient backs, flip to match, difficulty pills. Self-contained.
notes: Self-contained single-file template - no separate .css or .js files. Marker stamped.
Canonical wiring: 4x4 grid of 16 cards (8 pairs), flip-on-tap, match check, mismatch flip-back, difficulty pills generating different grid sizes.

goldenAssemblies.name: Swipe Merge (2048) Golden Assembly
goldenAssemblies.summary: Runnable 2048 composed inline from entities.swipe-tile-grid + UI scoreboard. 4x4 grid, two starting '2' tiles, classic beige palette, swipe to merge. Self-contained.
notes: Self-contained single-file template - no separate .css or .js files. Marker stamped.
Canonical wiring: 4x4 grid, swipe gestures + arrow-key fallback, merge-equal-value tiles in swipe direction, spawn new '2' (90%) or '4' (10%) after each move.

goldenAssemblies.name: Squaredle Word-Trace Golden Assembly
goldenAssemblies.summary: Runnable Squaredle/Wordhunt composed inline from entities.word-trace-grid + UI scoreboard. 4x4 letter grid, drag through adjacent cells, found-tray + target count. Self-contained.
notes: Self-contained single-file template - no separate .css or .js files. Marker stamped.
Canonical wiring: 4x4 letter grid with random distribution, pointer drag to trace adjacent cells (8-direction), backtrack support, dictionary check on commit, found-words tray.

goldenAssemblies.name: Quick Notes Apple-Notes Golden Assembly
goldenAssemblies.summary: Runnable Apple-Notes clone branded as Quick Notes. AppShell sidebar + editor pane; TextInput search in header; + New Note creates+selects+focuses; auto-save on each keystroke via localStorage / window.mChatAI.storage.
notes: Canonical wiring for a notes app: AppShell with sidebar (list of ListItem) + main (TextInput title + <textarea> body + delete Button) + header search TextInput.
Live editing keeps the sidebar row synced (primary=title, secondary=body preview).

goldenAssemblies.name: Bookshelf Raindrop Golden Assembly
goldenAssemblies.summary: Runnable Raindrop clone branded as Bookshelf. AppShell with tag sidebar + bookmark grid + add Modal (label/URL/tags). Favicons via Google s2; tag chips on each row; search and tag-filter.
notes: Canonical wiring for a list-with-modal-add productivity app: AppShell + Modal containing stacked TextInput fields + footer Save/Cancel Buttons.
Tag chips are rendered inline inside the ListItem via querySelector(.mchatai-list-item__text).appendChild - pattern reusable for any row that needs a metadata strip.

goldenAssemblies.name: Focus Timer Golden Assembly
goldenAssemblies.summary: Runnable focus-and-break timer. TimerRing 280px + Start/Reset/Mute Button row + session history list. Cycle Focus(25)->Short(5)x4->Long(15). Beep + Notification on complete. Today counter persisted to localStorage.
notes: Canonical wiring for a single-purpose timer tool: no AppShell, centered TimerRing, Button row, ListItem history.
Notification permission request happens inside the Start click handler (a user gesture) per Safari/Chrome requirements.

goldenAssemblies.name: TaskLanes Trello Golden Assembly
goldenAssemblies.summary: Runnable Trello-style kanban clone branded as TaskLanes. AppShell + horizontal row of Columns (Backlog/Todo/Doing/Done) with Cards. Click card opens edit Modal with move-to-column buttons. Inline + Add card per column. localStorage persistence.
notes: Canonical wiring for a board-style productivity app: AppShell with main pane only (no sidebar), board container is a horizontal flex row of Column elements, each Column contains a vertical stack of Cards.
Move-between-columns via the detail Modal's per-column buttons (v1). Drag-drop is deliberately deferred - too brittle on iOS Safari to ship without dedicated testing.
Sidebar slot is hidden via style.display='none' + grid-template-columns rewrite - for any single-pane productivity app that wants AppShell's header but not its sidebar.

goldenAssemblies.name: Spendwise Mint Golden Assembly
goldenAssemblies.summary: Runnable Mint-style expense tracker branded as Spendwise. AppShell + summary (DonutChart + $TOTAL) + DataTable of expenses + Add Modal. Category chips share color with donut slices via stable hash. Month nav. localStorage persistence.
notes: Canonical wiring for a data-input + table + chart productivity app: DataTable with column.render returning DOM nodes (TagChip for category, $-formatted amount, delete Button).

Pattern: deterministic category color via hash -> palette so TagChip and DonutChart slice match visually. Reuse this in any app with user-named categorical labels (recipes by tag, contacts by group, etc.).
Month navigation pattern: prev/next ghost Buttons + a label. State key '<app>.viewMonth' persisted in localStorage.

goldenAssemblies.name: TaskFlow Todoist Golden Assembly
goldenAssemblies.summary: Runnable Todoist clone branded as TaskFlow, composed from Button + TextInput + Checkbox + ListItem + EmptyState foundation Lego. Add/check/delete, filter All/Active/Done, persistent storage via localStorage or window.mChatAI.storage.
notes: Use this as the canonical wiring example for a productivity todo list: TextInput at top with Enter-to-add, list of ListItem rows with leading Checkbox + trailing x Button, filter row of variant-swapping ghost/primary Buttons, EmptyState when zero tasks, footer counter + Clear Completed action.
Persistence prefers window.mChatAI.storage when available; falls back to localStorage so the example runs standalone in any browser.
First Lego golden assembly that uses only ui/* foundation components (no entities, no core engines). All future productivity recipes (notes, bookmarks, kanban, etc.) should follow this same shape.
